fields.title: Migrate tau from plan skills to plan mode
fields.description: Add plan mode to tau (alongside smart/deep/rush). Inspired by codex's plan collaboration mode, but adapted: plan output is formalized as beads epics/tasks rather than immediately executed. Removes writing-plans and subagent-driven-development skills as they become redundant once plan mode exists.
fields.close_reason: Plan mode fully implemented: plan.md prompt created, mode system wired up, old plan skills removed.
